visualStages.stageInfo: No Step Information

(:action move
    :parameters (node1-5 node1-4 r)
    :precondition
      (and
        (or
          (empty node1-4)
          (filled node1-4 r)
        )
        (selected r)
        (head node1-5 r)
        (adjacent node1-5 node1-4)
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (head node1-4 r)
        (not
          (empty node1-4)
        )
      )
  )

(:action select-colour
    :parameters (r b)
    :precondition
      (and
        (selected r)
        (not
          (selected b)
        )
        (not
          (finished b)
        )
      )
    :effect
      (and
        (selected b)
        (not
          (selected r)
        )
        (finished r)
      )
  )
